stemHtml:
Given an aeroplane with:

Maximum Structural Landing Mass: 68 000 kg
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass: 70 200 kg
Maximum Structural Take-off Mass: 78 200 kg
Dry Operating Mass: 48 000 kg
Scheduled Trip Fuel: 7000 kg
Reserve Fuel: 2800 kg

Assuming performance limitations are not restricting, the maximum permitted take-off mass and maximum traffic load are respectively…
